title: D Nuttall UK Ltd
body: "The Traffic Commissioner made orders to:   revoke the operator licence held by D Nuttall UK Ltd with effect from 23:45 on 8 June 2018 disqualify D Nuttall UK Ltd for a period of 2 years from holding or obtaining an operator’s licence or being involved in the management, administration or control of any entity that holds or obtains such a licence, with effect from 23:45 on 8 June 2018 disqualify Mr Nuttall for a period of 2 years from holding or obtaining an operator’s licence or being involved in the management, administration or control of any entity that holds or obtains such a licence, with effect from 23:45 on 8 June 2018   The decision was made on 1 May 2018. "
